+# Independent settings for the planner's costmap
+global_costmap:
+  # attention, the order and combination method matters
+  plugins:
+    - name: static_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::StaticLayer'
+    - name: front_obstacle_laser_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: rear_obstacle_laser_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_rgbd_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: inflation_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::InflationLayer'

@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+# Independent settings for the planner's costmap
+global_costmap:
+  map_type: costmap
+
+  global_frame    : map
+  robot_base_frame: base_footprint
+
+  update_frequency : 10.0
+  publish_frequency: 1.0
+
+  track_unknown_space: true
+  unknown_cost_value : 255
+
+  robot_radius: 0.275
+
+  #plugins are loaded in a separate yaml file
+
+  static_layer:
+    enabled  : true
+    map_topic: map
+
+  front_obstacle_laser_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: base_scan
+    combination_method: 0 # can erase static layer
+
+    base_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_front_laser_link
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: scan_front_raw
+      expected_update_rate: 0.3
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 6.0
+      obstacle_range: 5.5
+
+  rear_obstacle_laser_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: base_scan
+    combination_method: 0 # can erase static layer
+
+    base_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_rear_laser_link
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: scan_rear_raw
+      expected_update_rate: 0.3
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 6.0
+      obstacle_range: 5.5
+
+  obstacle_rgbd_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: rgbd_scan
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    rgbd_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_footprint
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: rgbd_scan
+      expected_update_rate: 0.5
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 2.9
+      obstacle_range: 2.8
+      blanking_range: 1.55
+      mark_blanking: true
+      debug: false
+
+  inflation_layer:
+    enabled            : true
+    inflation_radius   : 0.6
+    cost_scaling_factor: 25.0
+

+# Independent settings for the local costmap
+local_costmap:
+  map_type: costmap
+
+  global_frame    : odom
+  robot_base_frame: base_footprint
+  transform_tolerance: 0.2
+
+  update_frequency : 10.0
+  publish_frequency: 1.0
+
+  rolling_window: true
+  width         : 4.0
+  height        : 4.0
+  resolution    : 0.025
+
+  robot_radius: 0.275
+
+  #plugins are loaded in a separate yaml file
+
+
+  front_obstacle_laser_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: base_scan
+    combination_method: 1 # cannot erase static layer
+
+    base_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_front_laser_link
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: scan_front_raw
+      expected_update_rate: 0.3
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 6.0
+      obstacle_range: 5.5
+
+  rear_obstacle_laser_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: base_scan
+    combination_method: 1 # cannot erase static layer
+
+    base_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_rear_laser_link
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: scan_rear_raw
+      expected_update_rate: 0.3
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 6.0
+      obstacle_range: 5.5
+
+  obstacle_rgbd_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: rgbd_scan
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    rgbd_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_footprint
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: rgbd_scan
+      expected_update_rate: 0.5
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 2.9
+      obstacle_range: 2.8
+      blanking_range: 1.55
+      mark_blanking: true
+      debug: true
+
+  inflation_layer:
+    enabled            : false # not used for pal_local_planner
+    inflation_radius   : 0.55
+    cost_scaling_factor: 25.0
+

+base_local_planner: teb_local_planner/TebLocalPlannerROS
+
+TebLocalPlannerROS:
+
+  odom_topic: /mobile_base_controller/odom
+  map_frame: map
+    
+  # Trajectory
+  
+  teb_autosize: True
+  dt_ref: 0.3
+  dt_hysteresis: 0.1
+  global_plan_overwrite_orientation: False
+  max_global_plan_lookahead_dist: 5.0
+  feasibility_check_no_poses: 5
+  global_plan_viapoint_sep: 0.3
+  min_samples: 5
+  exact_arc_length: True
+  allow_init_with_backwards_motion: false
+  force_reinit_new_goal_dist: 0.5
+  shrink_horizon_backup: True
+
+  # Robot
+  
+  max_vel_x: 0.5
+  max_vel_x_backwards: 0.0
+  max_vel_theta: 0.4
+  acc_lim_x: 0.4
+  acc_lim_theta: 0.3
+  is_footprint_dynamic: false
+  footprint_model:
+    type: "circular"
+    radius: 0.35
+
+  # GoalTolerance
+
+  xy_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+  yaw_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+  free_goal_vel: False
+
+  # Obstacles
+
+  min_obstacle_dist: 0.06
+  include_costmap_obstacles: True
+  obstacle_association_force_inclusion_factor: 4
+  costmap_obstacles_behind_robot_dist: 1.0
+  obstacle_poses_affected: 30
+  inflation_dist: 0.5
+
+  ## Costmap converter plugin (optional)
+  # costmap_converter_plugin: "costmap_converter::CostmapToPolygonsDBSConcaveHull" # no visible improvement
+  costmap_converter_plugin: ""
+  costmap_converter_spin_thread: True
+  costmap_converter_rate: 5
+
+  # Optimization
+    
+  no_inner_iterations: 5
+  no_outer_iterations: 4
+  optimization_activate: True
+  optimization_verbose: False
+  penalty_epsilon: 0.1
+  weight_max_vel_x: 1.0
+  weight_max_vel_y: 1.0
+  weight_max_vel_theta: 2.0
+  weight_acc_lim_x: 1.0
+  weight_acc_lim_y: 1.0
+  weight_acc_lim_theta: 2.0
+  weight_kinematics_nh: 1000.0
+  weight_kinematics_forward_drive: 800.0
+  weight_kinematics_turning_radius: 1.0
+  weight_optimaltime: 1.0
+  weight_shortest_path: 6.0
+  weight_obstacle: 500.0
+  weight_inflation: 0.1
+  weight_dynamic_obstacle: 10 # not in use yet
+  selection_alternative_time_cost: False # not in use yet
+  weight_viapoint: 2
+
+  # Homotopy Class Planner
+
+  enable_homotopy_class_planning: False
+  enable_multithreading: True
+  simple_exploration: False
+  max_number_classes: 4
+  roadmap_graph_no_samples: 15
+  roadmap_graph_area_width: 5
+  h_signature_prescaler: 0.5
+  h_signature_threshold: 0.1
+  obstacle_keypoint_offset: 0.1
+  obstacle_heading_threshold: 0.45
+  visualize_hc_graph: False

@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
+# Odometry model:
+odom_model_type: diff-corrected
+odom_alpha1    : 0.02
+odom_alpha2    : 0.002
+odom_alpha3    : 0.08
+odom_alpha4    : 0.002
+
+# Particle filter:
+min_particles    : 500
+max_particles    : 5000
+kld_err          : 0.05
+kld_z            : 0.99
+update_min_d     : 0.2
+update_min_a     : !degrees 10.0
+resample_interval: 1
+converge_dist_threshold: 0.5
+
+# Note that whichever mixture weights are in use should sum to 1. 
+# The beam model uses all 4: z_hit, z_short, z_max, and z_rand. 
+# The likelihood_field model uses only 2: z_hit and z_rand
+
+# Measurement (laser) model:
+laser_model_type         : likelihood_field
+laser_max_range          : -1.0 #use reported max range (default)
+laser_min_range          : -1.0 #use reported min range (default)
+laser_max_beams          : 30
+laser_z_hit              : 0.5
+laser_z_short            : 0.05
+laser_z_max              : 0.05
+laser_z_rand             : 0.5
+laser_sigma_hit          : 0.2
+laser_lambda_short       : 0.1
+laser_lambda_short       : 0.1
+laser_likelihood_max_dist: 2.0
+# Params specific for likelihood_field_prob (wrt likelihood_field):
+do_beamskip              : true
+beam_skip_distance       : 0.5
+beam_skip_threshold      : 0.3
+beam_skip_error_threshold: 0.9
+
+# Update/Rate params:
+transform_tolerance: 0.27 # This value is to assure that amcl is newest than odometry. It depends on laser offset and frequency
+gui_publish_rate   : 10.0
+
+# Recovery:
+recovery_alpha_slow: 0.0
+recovery_alpha_fast: 0.0
+
+# Frames:
+base_frame_id: base_footprint
+odom_frame_id: odom
+global_frame_id : map
+
+# Initial pose:
+save_pose_rate: -1.0 # disabled (< 0.0)
+
+# avoid VOs:
+avoid_unknown: true
+use_map_topic: true
+first_map_only: true

+  </node>
+</launch>

+TebLocalPlannerROS:
+
+ odom_topic: /mobile_base_controller/odom
+ map_frame: map
+    
+ # Trajectory
+  
+ teb_autosize: True
+ dt_ref: 0.3
+ dt_hysteresis: 0.1
+ global_plan_overwrite_orientation: True
+ max_global_plan_lookahead_dist: 5.0
+ feasibility_check_no_poses: 5
+ global_plan_viapoint_sep: 1.0
+ min_samples: 5
+ exact_arc_length: True
+ allow_init_with_backwards_motion: false
+
+ # Robot
+         
+ max_vel_x: 0.5
+ max_vel_x_backwards: 0.15
+ max_vel_theta: 1.0
+ acc_lim_x: 0.2
+ acc_lim_theta: !degrees 60.0
+ is_footprint_dynamic: false
+ footprint_model:
+  type: "circular"
+  radius: 0.27
+
+ # GoalTolerance
+    
+ xy_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+ yaw_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+ free_goal_vel: False
+    
+ # Obstacles
+    
+ min_obstacle_dist: 0.06
+ include_costmap_obstacles: True
+ costmap_obstacles_behind_robot_dist: 1.0
+ obstacle_poses_affected: 30
+ inflation_dist: 0.50
+
+ ## Costmap converter plugin (optional)
+ # costmap_converter_plugin: "costmap_converter::CostmapToPolygonsDBSConcaveHull" # no visible improvement
+ costmap_converter_plugin: ""
+ costmap_converter_spin_thread: True
+ costmap_converter_rate: 5
+
+ # Optimization
+    
+ no_inner_iterations: 5
+ no_outer_iterations: 4
+ optimization_activate: True
+ optimization_verbose: False
+ penalty_epsilon: 0.1
+ weight_max_vel_x: 2
+ weight_max_vel_theta: 10
+ weight_acc_lim_x: 1
+ weight_acc_lim_theta: 1
+ weight_kinematics_nh: 1000
+ weight_kinematics_forward_drive: 500
+ weight_kinematics_turning_radius: 1
+ weight_optimaltime: 1
+ weight_obstacle: 50
+ weight_inflation: 5.0
+ weight_dynamic_obstacle: 10 # not in use yet
+ selection_alternative_time_cost: False # not in use yet
+ weight_viapoint: 0.75
+
+ # Homotopy Class Planner
+
+ enable_homotopy_class_planning: False
+ enable_multithreading: True
+ simple_exploration: False
+ max_number_classes: 4
+ roadmap_graph_no_samples: 15
+ roadmap_graph_area_width: 5
+ h_signature_prescaler: 0.5
+ h_signature_threshold: 0.1
+ obstacle_keypoint_offset: 0.1
+ obstacle_heading_threshold: 0.45
+ visualize_hc_graph: False

+TrajectoryPlannerROS:

+  acc_lim_y: 0.0
+

+  escape_vel: 0.0
+

+  xy_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+  yaw_goal_tolerance: !degrees 10.0
+
+  # Forward simulation

+  vtheta_samples: 20

+# Odometry model:
+odom_model_type: diff-corrected
+odom_alpha1    : 0.02
+odom_alpha2    : 0.002
+odom_alpha3    : 0.08
+odom_alpha4    : 0.002
+
+# Particle filter:
+min_particles    : 500
+max_particles    : 5000
+kld_err          : 0.05
+kld_z            : 0.99
+update_min_d     : 0.2
+update_min_a     : !degrees 10.0
+resample_interval: 1
+converge_dist_threshold: 0.5
+
+# Note that whichever mixture weights are in use should sum to 1. 
+# The beam model uses all 4: z_hit, z_short, z_max, and z_rand. 
+# The likelihood_field model uses only 2: z_hit and z_rand
+
+# Measurement (laser) model:
+laser_model_type         : likelihood_field
+laser_max_range          : -1.0 #use reported max range (default)
+laser_min_range          : -1.0 #use reported min range (default)
+laser_max_beams          : 30
+laser_z_hit              : 0.5
+laser_z_short            : 0.05
+laser_z_max              : 0.05
+laser_z_rand             : 0.5
+laser_sigma_hit          : 0.2
+laser_lambda_short       : 0.1
+laser_lambda_short       : 0.1
+laser_likelihood_max_dist: 2.0
+# Params specific for likelihood_field_prob (wrt likelihood_field):
+do_beamskip              : true
+beam_skip_distance       : 0.5
+beam_skip_threshold      : 0.3
+beam_skip_error_threshold: 0.9
+
+# Update/Rate params:
+transform_tolerance: 0.27 # This value is to assure that amcl is newest than odometry. It depends on laser offset and frequency
+gui_publish_rate   : 10.0
+
+# Recovery:
+recovery_alpha_slow: 0.0
+recovery_alpha_fast: 0.0
+
+# Frames:
+base_frame_id   : base_footprint
+odom_frame_id   : odom
+global_frame_id : map
+
+# Initial pose:
+save_pose_rate: -1.0 # disabled (< 0.0)
+
+# avoid VOs:
+# avoid_unknown: true

+TebLocalPlannerROS:
+
+ odom_topic: /mobile_base_controller/odom
+ map_frame: map
+    
+ # Trajectory
+  
+ teb_autosize: True
+ dt_ref: 0.3
+ dt_hysteresis: 0.1
+ global_plan_overwrite_orientation: True
+ max_global_plan_lookahead_dist: 5.0
+ feasibility_check_no_poses: 5
+ global_plan_viapoint_sep: 1.0
+ min_samples: 5
+ exact_arc_length: True
+ allow_init_with_backwards_motion: false
+
+ # Robot
+         
+ max_vel_x: 0.5
+ max_vel_x_backwards: 0.15
+ max_vel_theta: 1.0
+ acc_lim_x: 0.2
+ acc_lim_theta: !degrees 60.0
+ is_footprint_dynamic: true
+ footprint_model:
+  type: "circular"
+  radius: 0.27
+ #  type: "polygon"
+ #  vertices: [[0.17,-0.31],[0.23,-0.18],[0.23,0.18],[0.17,0.31],[-0.20,0.40],[-0.56,0.3],[-0.6, 0],[-0.56,-0.3],[-0.20,-0.40]]
+
+ # GoalTolerance
+    
+ xy_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+ yaw_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+ free_goal_vel: False
+    
+ # Obstacles
+    
+ min_obstacle_dist: 0.06
+ include_costmap_obstacles: True
+ costmap_obstacles_behind_robot_dist: 1.0
+ obstacle_poses_affected: 30
+ inflation_dist: 0.50
+
+ ## Costmap converter plugin (optional)
+ # costmap_converter_plugin: "costmap_converter::CostmapToPolygonsDBSConcaveHull" # no visible improvement
+ costmap_converter_plugin: ""
+ costmap_converter_spin_thread: True
+ costmap_converter_rate: 5
+
+ # Optimization
+    
+ no_inner_iterations: 5
+ no_outer_iterations: 4
+ optimization_activate: True
+ optimization_verbose: False
+ penalty_epsilon: 0.1
+ weight_max_vel_x: 2
+ weight_max_vel_theta: 10
+ weight_acc_lim_x: 1
+ weight_acc_lim_theta: 1
+ weight_kinematics_nh: 1000
+ weight_kinematics_forward_drive: 500
+ weight_kinematics_turning_radius: 1
+ weight_optimaltime: 1
+ weight_obstacle: 50
+ weight_inflation: 5.0
+ weight_dynamic_obstacle: 10 # not in use yet
+ selection_alternative_time_cost: False # not in use yet
+ weight_viapoint: 0.75
+
+ # Homotopy Class Planner
+
+ enable_homotopy_class_planning: False
+ enable_multithreading: True
+ simple_exploration: False
+ max_number_classes: 4
+ roadmap_graph_no_samples: 15
+ roadmap_graph_area_width: 5
+ h_signature_prescaler: 0.5
+ h_signature_threshold: 0.1
+ obstacle_keypoint_offset: 0.1
+ obstacle_heading_threshold: 0.45
+ visualize_hc_graph: False

+TrajectoryPlannerROS:
+  # Acceleration limits
+  acc_lim_th: !degrees 60.0
+  acc_lim_theta: !degrees 60.0
+  acc_lim_x: 0.8
+  acc_lim_y: 0.0
+
+  # Velocity limits
+  max_vel_x: 1.00
+  min_vel_x: 0.01
+  max_vel_theta: !degrees  60.0
+  min_vel_theta: !degrees -60.0
+  min_in_place_vel_theta: !degrees 20.0
+  max_rotational_vel: !degrees 60.0
+  min_in_place_rotational_vel: !degrees 20.0
+
+  # Forbid backwards velocities
+  escape_vel: 0.0
+
+  # Goal tolerance
+  xy_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+  yaw_goal_tolerance: !degrees 10.0
+
+  # Forward simulation
+  sim_time: 1.0
+  vx_samples: 10
+  vtheta_samples: 20
+
+  # Trajectory scoring
+  meter_scoring: true
+  pdist_scale: 1.2
+  gdist_scale: 0.8
+  occdist_scale: 0.01
+  heading_scale: 0.3 #@todo create PR to support changing it!
+  path_distance_bias: 1.2
+  goal_distance_bias: 0.8
+  #@todo test the heading_scoring; when set to true the navigation goes bad (many rotations), so it seems that serious scoring tuning is needed
+  heading_scoring: false
+  heading_scoring_timestep: 0.1
+  heading_lookahead: 0.325
+  dwa: true
+  #sim_granularity: 0.025
+
+  # Oscillation prevention
+  oscillation_reset_dist: 0.05
+
+  # Differential-drive robot
+  holonomic_robot: false
+  max_vel_y: 0.0
+  min_vel_y: 0.0
+  vy_samples: 0
+
+  # Eat up the plan as the robot moves along it
+  prune_plan: true
+
+  publish_cost_grid: true

+# Odometry model:
+odom_model_type: diff-corrected
+odom_alpha1    : 0.02
+odom_alpha2    : 0.002
+odom_alpha3    : 0.08
+odom_alpha4    : 0.002
+
+# Particle filter:
+min_particles    : 500
+max_particles    : 5000
+kld_err          : 0.05
+kld_z            : 0.99
+update_min_d     : 0.2
+update_min_a     : !degrees 10.0
+resample_interval: 1
+converge_dist_threshold: 0.5
+
+# Note that whichever mixture weights are in use should sum to 1. 
+# The beam model uses all 4: z_hit, z_short, z_max, and z_rand. 
+# The likelihood_field model uses only 2: z_hit and z_rand
+
+# Measurement (laser) model:
+laser_model_type         : likelihood_field
+laser_max_range          : -1.0 #use reported max range (default)
+laser_min_range          : -1.0 #use reported min range (default)
+laser_max_beams          : 30
+laser_z_hit              : 0.5
+laser_z_short            : 0.05
+laser_z_max              : 0.05
+laser_z_rand             : 0.5
+laser_sigma_hit          : 0.2
+laser_lambda_short       : 0.1
+laser_lambda_short       : 0.1
+laser_likelihood_max_dist: 2.0
+# Params specific for likelihood_field_prob (wrt likelihood_field):
+do_beamskip              : true
+beam_skip_distance       : 0.5
+beam_skip_threshold      : 0.3
+beam_skip_error_threshold: 0.9
+
+# Update/Rate params:
+transform_tolerance: 0.27 # This value is to assure that amcl is newest than odometry. It depends on laser offset and frequency
+gui_publish_rate   : 10.0
+
+# Recovery:
+recovery_alpha_slow: 0.0
+recovery_alpha_fast: 0.0
+
+# Frames:
+base_frame_id   : base_footprint
+odom_frame_id   : odom
+global_frame_id : map
+
+# Initial pose:
+save_pose_rate: -1.0 # disabled (< 0.0)
+
+# avoid VOs:
+# avoid_unknown: true

+<launch>
+
+  <arg name="state" default="localization"/>
+
+  <arg name="planner"        default="base"/>
+  <arg name="global_planner" default="global_planner"/>
+  <arg name="local_planner"  default="pal"/>

+  <arg name="disable_vo"     default="false"/>

+  <arg name="multiple"       default="false"/>
+
+  <arg name="map" default="$(env HOME)/.pal/tiago_maps/config"/>
+
+  <!-- Localization or Mapping state -->
+  <node pkg="pal_navigation_sm" type="navigation.sh" name="navigation"
+        args="tiago $(arg state) $(arg localization) $(arg mapping) $(arg map) $(arg octomap) $(arg multiple) $(arg tf_prefix)" output="screen"/>
+
+  <!-- Navigation State Machine -->
+  <include file="$(find pal_navigation_cfg_tiago)/launch/state_machine.launch">
+    <arg name="state" value="$(arg state)"/>
+    <arg name="public_sim" value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+    <arg if="$(arg multiple)" name="map_frame" value="/$(arg tf_prefix)/map"/>
+    <arg if="$(arg multiple)" name="base_frame" value="/$(arg tf_prefix)/base_footprint"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- Planning -->
+  <include file="$(find pal_navigation_cfg_tiago)/launch/move_$(arg planner).launch">
+    <arg name="global_planner" value="$(arg global_planner)"/>
+    <arg name="local_planner"  value="$(arg local_planner)"/>
+    <arg name="public_sim"     value="$(arg public_sim)"/>
+    <arg name="rgbd_sensors"   value="$(arg rgbd_sensors)"/>
+    <arg name="tf_prefix"      value="$(arg tf_prefix)"/>
+    <arg name="multiple"       value="$(arg multiple)"/>
+  </include>
+
+  <!-- VO map server -->
+  <group unless="$(arg public_sim)">
+    <include file="$(find pal_vo_server)/launch/vo_server.launch"/>
+  </group>
+
+</launch>

data.author: saracooper18
data.message: Add gmapping config and launch file for ARI

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+base_frame: base_footprint
+
+map_update_interval: 1.0
+
+maxUrange: 9.0
+maxRange : 10.0
+
+sigma     : 0.05
+kernelSize: 1
+lstep     : 0.05
+astep     : 0.05
+iterations: 5
+lsigma    : 0.075
+ogain     : 3.0
+lskip     : 0
+
+srr: 0.1
+srt: 0.2
+str: 0.1
+stt: 0.2
+
+linearUpdate     :  0.1
+angularUpdate    :  0.2
+temporalUpdate   : -1.0
+resampleThreshold:  0.7
+particles        : 30
+
+xmin : -50.0
+ymin : -50.0
+xmax :  50.0
+ymax :  50.0
+delta:   0.05
+
+llsamplerange: 0.01
+llsamplestep : 0.01
+lasamplerange: 0.005
+lasamplestep : 0.005
+
+transform_publish_period: 0.05
+
+

+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(pal_navigation_cfg_tiago_dual)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+
+catkin_package()
+
+install(DIRECTORY config launch
+        DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION})
+

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+CarrotPlanner:
+  transform_tolerance: 0.2
+
+  step_size: 0.1
+  min_dist_from_robot: 0.5

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+base_global_planner: carrot_planner/CarrotPlanner

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# Independent settings for the planner's costmap
+global_costmap:
+  plugins:
+    - name: static_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::StaticLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_laser_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_rgbd_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: inflation_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::InflationLayer'

@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+# Independent settings for the planner's costmap
+global_costmap:
+  map_type: costmap
+
+  global_frame    : map
+  robot_base_frame: base_footprint
+
+  update_frequency : 1.0
+  publish_frequency: 1.0
+
+  transform_tolerance: 0.2
+
+  resolution: 0.05
+
+  track_unknown_space: true
+  unknown_cost_value : 255
+
+  robot_radius: 0.3
+
+  #plugins are loaded on a separate file
+
+  static_layer:
+    enabled  : true
+    map_topic: vo_map
+
+  obstacle_laser_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: base_scan
+    combination_method: 1 # @todo only with 1 works on the robot: otherwise the map walls are cleared
+
+    base_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_laser_link
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: scan
+      expected_update_rate: 0.3
+      observation_persistence: 1.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 5.5
+      obstacle_range: 5.0
+      min_obstacle_height: -0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 0.2
+
+  obstacle_rgbd_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: rgbd_scan
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    rgbd_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_footprint
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: rgbd_scan
+      expected_update_rate: 0.5
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 3.5
+      obstacle_range: 3.2
+      blanking_range: 0.5
+      min_obstacle_height: -0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 0.2
+      debug: true
+
+  inflation_layer:
+    enabled            : true
+    inflation_radius   : 0.60
+    cost_scaling_factor: 25.0

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# Independent settings for the local costmap
+local_costmap:
+  plugins:
+    - name: obstacle_laser_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_sonar_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_rgbd_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: inflation_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::InflationLayer'

@@ -0,0 +1,97 @@
+# Independent settings for the local costmap
+local_costmap:
+  map_type: costmap
+
+  global_frame    : odom
+  robot_base_frame: base_footprint
+  transform_tolerance: 0.2
+
+  update_frequency : 5.0
+  publish_frequency: 2.0
+
+  static_map    : false
+  rolling_window: true
+  width         : 5.0
+  height        : 5.0
+  # @todo try to reduce the resolution and check if it helps in narrow spaces
+  resolution    : 0.05
+
+  robot_radius: 0.3
+
+  #plugins are loaded on a separate file
+
+  obstacle_laser_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: base_scan
+    combination_method: 1 # @todo review why here for the local costmap we use '1' for all layers
+
+    base_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_laser_link
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: scan
+      expected_update_rate: 0.3
+      observation_persistence: 1.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 3.0
+      obstacle_range: 2.5
+      min_obstacle_height: -0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 0.2
+
+  obstacle_rgbd_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: rgbd_scan
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    rgbd_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_footprint
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: rgbd_scan
+      expected_update_rate: 0.5
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 3.5
+      obstacle_range: 3.2
+      blanking_range: 0.5
+      min_obstacle_height: -0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 0.2
+      debug: true
+
+  obstacle_sonar_layer:
+    enabled: false
+    observation_sources: sonar_cloud sonar_max_range_cloud
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    sonar_cloud:
+      sensor_frame: base_link
+      data_type: PointCloud2
+      topic: sonar_cloud
+      expected_update_rate: 1.0
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 3.0
+      obstacle_range: 2.5
+      min_obstacle_height: 0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 1.8
+
+    sonar_max_range_cloud:
+      sensor_frame: base_link
+      data_type: PointCloud2
+      topic: sonar_max_range_cloud
+      expected_update_rate: 1.0
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      marking: false
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 4.5
+      obstacle_range: 3.0
+      min_obstacle_height: 0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 1.8
+
+  inflation_layer:
+    enabled            : true
+    inflation_radius   : 0.6
+    cost_scaling_factor: 5.0

+TebLocalPlannerROS:
+
+ odom_topic: /mobile_base_controller/odom
+ map_frame: map
+    
+ # Trajectory
+  
+ teb_autosize: True
+ dt_ref: 0.3
+ dt_hysteresis: 0.1
+ global_plan_overwrite_orientation: True
+ max_global_plan_lookahead_dist: 5.0
+ feasibility_check_no_poses: 5
+ global_plan_viapoint_sep: 1.0
+ min_samples: 5
+ exact_arc_length: True
+ allow_init_with_backwards_motion: false
+
+ # Robot
+         
+ max_vel_x: 0.5
+ max_vel_x_backwards: 0.15
+ max_vel_theta: 1.0
+ acc_lim_x: 0.2
+ acc_lim_theta: !degrees 60.0
+ is_footprint_dynamic: true
+ footprint_model:
+  type: "circular"
+  radius: 0.3
+ #  type: "polygon"
+ #  vertices: [[0.17,-0.31],[0.23,-0.18],[0.23,0.18],[0.17,0.31],[-0.20,0.40],[-0.56,0.3],[-0.6, 0],[-0.56,-0.3],[-0.20,-0.40]]
+
+ # GoalTolerance
+    
+ xy_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+ yaw_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+ free_goal_vel: False
+    
+ # Obstacles
+    
+ min_obstacle_dist: 0.06
+ include_costmap_obstacles: True
+ costmap_obstacles_behind_robot_dist: 1.0
+ obstacle_poses_affected: 30
+ inflation_dist: 0.50
+
+ ## Costmap converter plugin (optional)
+ # costmap_converter_plugin: "costmap_converter::CostmapToPolygonsDBSConcaveHull" # no visible improvement
+ costmap_converter_plugin: ""
+ costmap_converter_spin_thread: True
+ costmap_converter_rate: 5
+
+ # Optimization
+    
+ no_inner_iterations: 5
+ no_outer_iterations: 4
+ optimization_activate: True
+ optimization_verbose: False
+ penalty_epsilon: 0.1
+ weight_max_vel_x: 2
+ weight_max_vel_theta: 10
+ weight_acc_lim_x: 1
+ weight_acc_lim_theta: 1
+ weight_kinematics_nh: 1000
+ weight_kinematics_forward_drive: 500
+ weight_kinematics_turning_radius: 1
+ weight_optimaltime: 1
+ weight_obstacle: 50
+ weight_inflation: 5.0
+ weight_dynamic_obstacle: 10 # not in use yet
+ selection_alternative_time_cost: False # not in use yet
+ weight_viapoint: 0.75
+
+ # Homotopy Class Planner
+
+ enable_homotopy_class_planning: False
+ enable_multithreading: True
+ simple_exploration: False
+ max_number_classes: 4
+ roadmap_graph_no_samples: 15
+ roadmap_graph_area_width: 5
+ h_signature_prescaler: 0.5
+ h_signature_threshold: 0.1
+ obstacle_keypoint_offset: 0.1
+ obstacle_heading_threshold: 0.45
+ visualize_hc_graph: False

+TrajectoryPlannerROS:
+  # Acceleration limits
+  acc_lim_th: !degrees 60.0
+  acc_lim_theta: !degrees 60.0
+  acc_lim_x: 0.8
+  acc_lim_y: 0.0
+
+  # Velocity limits
+  max_vel_x: 1.00
+  min_vel_x: 0.01
+  max_vel_theta: !degrees  60.0
+  min_vel_theta: !degrees -60.0
+  min_in_place_vel_theta: !degrees 20.0
+  max_rotational_vel: !degrees 60.0
+  min_in_place_rotational_vel: !degrees 20.0
+
+  # Forbid backwards velocities
+  escape_vel: 0.0
+
+  # Goal tolerance
+  xy_goal_tolerance: 0.2
+  yaw_goal_tolerance: !degrees 10.0
+
+  # Forward simulation
+  sim_time: 1.0
+  vx_samples: 10
+  vtheta_samples: 20
+
+  # Trajectory scoring
+  meter_scoring: true
+  pdist_scale: 1.2
+  gdist_scale: 0.8
+  occdist_scale: 0.01
+  heading_scale: 0.3 #@todo create PR to support changing it!
+  path_distance_bias: 1.2
+  goal_distance_bias: 0.8
+  #@todo test the heading_scoring; when set to true the navigation goes bad (many rotations), so it seems that serious scoring tuning is needed
+  heading_scoring: false
+  heading_scoring_timestep: 0.1
+  heading_lookahead: 0.325
+  dwa: true
+  #sim_granularity: 0.025
+
+  # Oscillation prevention
+  oscillation_reset_dist: 0.05
+
+  # Differential-drive robot
+  holonomic_robot: false
+  max_vel_y: 0.0
+  min_vel_y: 0.0
+  vy_samples: 0
+
+  # Eat up the plan as the robot moves along it
+  prune_plan: true
+
+  publish_cost_grid: true

+# Odometry model:
+odom_model_type: diff-corrected
+odom_alpha1    : 0.02
+odom_alpha2    : 0.002
+odom_alpha3    : 0.08
+odom_alpha4    : 0.002
+
+# Particle filter:
+min_particles    : 500
+max_particles    : 5000
+kld_err          : 0.05
+kld_z            : 0.99
+update_min_d     : 0.2
+update_min_a     : !degrees 10.0
+resample_interval: 1
+converge_dist_threshold: 0.5
+
+# Note that whichever mixture weights are in use should sum to 1. 
+# The beam model uses all 4: z_hit, z_short, z_max, and z_rand. 
+# The likelihood_field model uses only 2: z_hit and z_rand
+
+# Measurement (laser) model:
+laser_model_type         : likelihood_field
+laser_max_range          : -1.0 #use reported max range (default)
+laser_min_range          : -1.0 #use reported min range (default)
+laser_max_beams          : 30
+laser_z_hit              : 0.5
+laser_z_short            : 0.05
+laser_z_max              : 0.05
+laser_z_rand             : 0.5
+laser_sigma_hit          : 0.2
+laser_lambda_short       : 0.1
+laser_lambda_short       : 0.1
+laser_likelihood_max_dist: 2.0
+# Params specific for likelihood_field_prob (wrt likelihood_field):
+do_beamskip              : true
+beam_skip_distance       : 0.5
+beam_skip_threshold      : 0.3
+beam_skip_error_threshold: 0.9
+
+# Update/Rate params:
+transform_tolerance: 0.27 # This value is to assure that amcl is newest than odometry. It depends on laser offset and frequency
+gui_publish_rate   : 10.0
+
+# Recovery:
+recovery_alpha_slow: 0.0
+recovery_alpha_fast: 0.0
+
+# Frames:
+base_frame_id   : base_footprint
+odom_frame_id   : odom
+global_frame_id : map
+
+# Initial pose:
+save_pose_rate: -1.0 # disabled (< 0.0)
+
+# avoid VOs:
+# avoid_unknown: true

+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<launch>
+  <arg name="scan" default="scan"/>
+  <arg name="multiple" default="false"/>
+  <arg name="tf_prefix" default=""/>
+
+  <arg name="amcl_with_mapping" default="false"/>
+
+  <node pkg="amcl" type="amcl" name="amcl" output="screen">
+    <remap from="scan" to="$(arg scan)"/>
